name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - RDP Session Without Encryption
notes: This rule triggers when RDP sessions without encryption has been used. See ACSC advice for more information (https://www.cyber.gov.au/acsc/view-all-content/publications/using-remote-desktop-clients).
conditions_text: when the flow matches "rdp encryption level" IS NOT NULL AND "rdp encryption level" = 'No Encryption' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - RDP Session Without Encryption on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches "rdp encryption level" IS NOT NULL AND "rdp encryption level" = 'No Encryption' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - RDP Session Without Encryption
Event description: Detects when RDP sessions without encryption has been used.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
